notes: Installed via the Odra livenet backend (cargo odra build → wasm/Verity.wasm, lowered to MVP).
Contract calls target the contract PACKAGE (byPackageHash) — byHash on a package hash is rejected as an Invalid transaction (-32016).
Oracle lifecycle (post_value → settle) broadcast + confirmed on-chain via scripts/settle.ts with VERITY_DEMO=false.
The featured settle (ce35dd60…) is the MISS that dropped the EWMA reputation 83.2 → 58.2 — accuracy as on-chain collateral.
post_value(asset, value_bps:u32, confidence_bps:u32, rationale_hash) and settle(post_id:u32, ground_truth_bps:u32) verified against contract/src/verity.rs.
